title: More End Cities
body:
Have you ever spent a whole night looking for an End City without any luck?
This simple mod makes the End Cities a lot more likely to spawn.

It's perfect for multiplayer servers or players who need to keep their disk usage low.

No client required.

# With this mod
![More End Cities](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/505/347/comparison_wtih.png)

# Vanilla
